caption: A screen recording captures a web browser displaying a page titled "Rural Community Food System." The page features a dark background with a complex, circular diagram consisting of nodes and connecting lines. On the left side of the screen, white text introduces the topic, asking, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community?" It mentions that the goal is for the system to be "as locally owned and operated to benefit the community." A section titled "Session Videos" lists several dated links, and a call to action encourages viewers to contribute by "adding communities" or "mapping a member." The text also mentions the "former WikiCollaboratory" and "the Crit Norms." In the top right corner of the browser, a small video feed shows a man with a beard wearing a dark shirt. Throughout the sequence, the display remains static, with only a white mouse cursor moving across the center of the screen.
